scripts.badges:seed:test:all: node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs build 1 && node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs quality 1 && node ../scripts/readme/refresh-badges.mjs security 1
scripts.test:all: npm run badges:seed:test:all && npm run build:all && npm run quality:check:all && npm run security:check:all && npm run test:unit:all
scripts.quality:check:all: node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs quality "npm run quality:format:check:all && npm run quality:lint:check:all && npm run quality:type:all"
scripts.quality:format:check:all: npm run quality:format:check:midgard-sdk && npm run quality:format:check:midgard-manager && npm run quality:format:check:midgard-node && npm run quality:terraform:format:check
scripts.quality:format:fix:all: npm run quality:format:fix:midgard-sdk && npm run quality:format:fix:midgard-manager && npm run quality:format:fix:midgard-node && npm run quality:terraform:format:fix
scripts.quality:lint:check:all: npm run quality:lint:check:midgard-sdk && npm run quality:lint:check:midgard-manager
scripts.quality:lint:fix:all: npm run quality:lint:fix:midgard-sdk && npm run quality:lint:fix:midgard-manager
scripts.quality:type:all: npm run quality:type:midgard-node && npm run quality:type:midgard-sdk && npm run quality:type:midgard-ts
scripts.security:audit:all: npm run security:audit:demo && npm run security:audit:midgard-sdk && npm run security:audit:midgard-node && npm run security:audit:midgard-ts
scripts.test:unit:all: node ../scripts/readme/run-badged-command.mjs unit "npm run test:node:unit && npm run test:sdk:unit"
